name: @smooai/smooth-operator-js
description: Workspace root for the smooth-operator JavaScript/TypeScript packages. `typescript/` is the published npm SDK (client + React bindings + web-component widget, as subpath exports); `console/` is the private admin app. Changesets drives a single lockstep version across all published artifacts (npm + NuGet + …) via scripts/sync-versions.mjs.

scripts.version:bump: pnpm changeset version && pnpm run version:sync
